reviews.review_description:
I've played recently is extremely fun and addictive. Seriously, the battles at the beginning are quite simple, but then each battle is exciting. The bosses are really cool.
The maneuvers, the speed of the ship, the upgrades, and the ships that are unlocked are the great charm of the game.
Wow, such an incredible game at an excellent price, a game out of the ordinary. I hadn't seen a game like this before.

developer_response.body: Wow! We're so happy to receive your feedback! We'll have some really fun news coming soon! Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing. It’s like playing with space toys and playing an old arcade game at the same time. Most ships will remind you of movies and tv shows which is very fun. The woman’s voice who’s most likely your ships navigation is a very nice touch and helps very much. Can’t wait for more levels or ships or anything. Maybe some customization.

One thing that needs fixing is the main menu always has a “loading” notification, and it’s huge, and blocks everything. You can find a way to work around it but it’s really annoying . Also once you beat a boss the levels just end. There should be more of a nod that the level will end after the boss shows up. Game is so freakin cool.

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you liked it! I think you're reading our minds.

The next releases will be in this order:

1. New game mode with an additional ship.

2. Online 2x2, 3x3, 4x4 and then cooperative modes.

3. New ships and features, such as a fun warp drive on some ships, not to mention many more enemy ships.

reviews.review_description: This mixed reality spaceship game is incredible. The physics feel surprisingly realistic, with smooth ship movement and satisfying interactions that make every flight and landing feel immersive. The graphics are sharp and vibrant, and the way the ship blends into my real room through mixed reality is seriously impressive. Gameplay is the real standout, though — it’s fun, intuitive, and keeps me engaged with exploration, action, and just enough challenge to stay exciting. Easily one of the coolest space games I’ve played in mixed reality.”

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you liked it! It took many months of hard work to get this game going, and feedback like yours makes us realize it was all worth it.
This month we have some exciting news! Horde Mode arrives next weekend!

reviews.review_description: It’s a really fun space combat game. I like how we can control the ship, it feels like piloting a remote-controlled ship. The variety of ships is good! Looking forward to more updates.

developer_response.body: We focused heavily on gameplay and maneuverability, which helped make the game very dynamic and fun! More news about the game coming soon, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: You might not expect it from the title, but the ship flying and navigation feel great. Definitely worth checking out. Combined with the roguelite elements, it makes for a surprisingly addictive and rewarding experience.

developer_response.body: We're glad you liked it! We'll be releasing new game modes soon, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Once this game fixes the glitches, I think this will be a very popular game and I will score it higher.  Right now, it takes forever to load in. Once loaded, when you are trying to select a level OR select an upgrade, a box pops up over the area that says "LOADING" and you cannot see what is behind it. You have to move around to peak over or under the square to click on what you want. The load in screen does not stay in one place as you are selecting your ship or upgrading. As you move your head, the entire page also moves with it. It needs to stay in one place as you are doing your loadout. I still had fun playing the game and will suggest it to others on my Review page on YouTube for now, but once you have fixed the few problems it has, I will be back to raise my rating score and let people know about it on my YT page.

reviews.review_title: A good choice for mixed reality!
reviews.review_description: I never get tired of the MR apps/games

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We're rushing to launch the Frenzy game mode! Featuring several high-level ships simultaneously! Hope you enjoy it!
We're very sorry you didn't like it. If you'd like to be more specific, that would help us a lot in improving!

reviews.review_title: Moo’ve Over I’ve Got a Cow to save
reviews.review_description: This is bonkers in all the right ways, everything looks sharp and vibrant, and the mixed reality aspect makes it feel like the madness is happening right in your living room.  The gameplay is simple but addictive—protect your cow from wave after wave of bizarre aliens threats using your space ship.  I did find the controls hard but it maybe how my brain is wired, I went up when it should be down and down when it should be up.  My lefts were rights, you get the picture.  I wish there was a way in the settings of swapping the contols to suit my brain.

Now I’m no expert at these type s of games, my direction sense is awful, if you can master the controls, then this is definitely a game that will hit the mark.
The concept is quite interesting & unique, taking down aliens that want your cows, don’t takes a white (for me anyway to get to grips with the mechanics) but with practice I am mastering the art of flying.
Graphics are really sharp and gameplay is fun, you can tell the devs have worked hard on this game for a while,
Great fun & must have if you love MR & Cows obviously 
.

Protect My Cow is a surprisingly fun and addictive game The concept is straightforward  but really engaging—you have to think fast and stay alert to protect your cow from different threats, which keeps the gameplay exciting. The controls felt  smooth, and the immersion made it fun. Definitely worth checking out if you want something light hearted but still challenging. Looking forward to future updates
Like the game it’s cool . like the fact I can sit back relax and play just gotta get use to the controls , can’t wait for more content

developer_response.body: We appreciate your feedback and are working hard to launch an online version.
